definitions: To lift or retrieve someone or something from a lower position.
To collect someone, especially by car, from a particular place.
To make someone feel better or more energetic.
To notice or learn something, often by chance.
examples: Can you pick me up from the airport?
The coffee will pick me up.
I need to pick me up the dropped pen.
The police might pick me up for questioning.
I hope this good news will pick me up.
